meta.title: French Opposition Leader Jean-Francois Cope on France's Role
meta.description: The Eurozone crisis, as well as America's rebalance towards Asia, have led some to see a shrinking role for Europe on the world stage. France, once viewed as the co-pilot of Europe alongside Germany, now seems to occupy a less prominent role in European affairs. But France's refusal to sign off at first on an Iranian nuclear deal is one sign that her role on the international stage is not shrinking.
